channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti in panel near the door of Cygnet House on Woodland Crescent, 3rd March
item.description:
Graffiti here, great if you can remove

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Poo Rushmore/ Millfields Rd, 3rd March
item.description:
(Person in photo is Nothing to do with it)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolly of flytipping, 3rd March
item.description:
Been here 2+ weeks, not clearly visible from either St Andrews Close or the Thames Path. It is tucked away on the footpath between St Andrews Close and the Thames Path. Unfortunately more people are adding to the pile. Please can we have clear signage here saying "no dumping of rubbish" as it's illegal and can result in fine/imprisonment and including links or QR codes to council pages of how to properly dispose of rubbish, as some landlords are telling their residents they can put rubbish here for the council to collect as part of "community waste" !!! (Local residents have previously told us this when we have challenged them).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Andrews Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter thrown from windows, 3rd March
item.description:
Residents of Holyrood House are throwing rubbish out of windows and we have to see it lying in the grass. This has been raised a number of times with Hackney Council.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Portland Rise, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
This has been here for two weeks now. It was pointed out to Enfield council representatives on a walk around last week but nothing has been done.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car blocking the crossing, 3rd March
item.description:
There's no ramp to help with crossing the road on this side because of this car. You can't use the button for the traffic lights either. Despite cones being in place someone decided to move them and park here. This car needs moving or the lights and a ramp added

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powys Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd March
item.description:
This night somebody threw a yellow basket and a shower bottom just on our calm residential road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter dumped on street, 3rd March
item.description:
There is litter dumped daily on the intersection of Brooke Rd and Reighton Rd. Today a new pile of rubbish has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 3rd March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parsonage Lane, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Rocking slab, 3rd March
item.description:
Slab rocks, good inch hole now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50a, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping BR14JX, 3rd March
item.description:
Environmental health hazard, there has been pileup of hazardous rubbish waste at this location for months. This is not within Bromley Council’s remit area so was directed to this website. Urgent thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coniston Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The traffic lights here are all out., 3rd March
item.description:
The button isn’t working and none of the lights are on.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fleet Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Moped. Petrol in stream/woods., 3rd March
item.description:
///dare.grin.swan Abandoned Moped. Petrol in stream/woods.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ember Close, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: Mud spread across pavement, 3rd March
item.description:
Mud being spread across pavement from illegal parking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 212, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large chunk of kerbstone has become dislodged and is a hazard to cars and pedestrians., 3rd March
item.description:
It has been like it for several days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dittisham Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pohole, 300mm x 300mm x 75mm deep on roundabout, 3rd March
item.description:
Large pohole, 300mm x 300mm x 75mm deep on roundabout. Exit the A2 at Blendon, and as you enter the roundabout, there is a large hole in the road.. Stuff coming around the roundabout too from the Audi garage also clips it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Blendon Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cleaners shed used as waste area, 3rd March
item.description:
Hello, please could we have a new lock and door for this shed as reported for the last 3 months now? We are still experiencing fly tipping and this will not stop until the issue has been addressed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weymouth Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10/12 inch pothole on Lee Road, at the junction for Blackheath Park., 3rd March
item.description:
Pothole has been visible for at least 4 weeks, raised ironworks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stuff being dumped by bins outside my back gate, 3rd March
item.description:
Pile up has been there several weeks and continues to get worse. someone keeps wedging back alley gate that leads into more social areas with a brick even though it can be closed securely it can be opened from outside easily .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
